rules.desc: Use this chatbot as tool but use it with moderate and responsibility
Don't insult to this chatbot and also, ai and/or users or the chatbot will get timeout (max warnings are 3)
Be cool and dont be afraid to use this chatbot
This chatbot is for people with +18 years old and for people below of 18 years old, they will not able to use to this chatbot due to law of age verification
Don't send anything bad things for this chatbot (spam, piracy, etc) or the chatbot will get timeout and you will get banned temporarily (1 week is max ban time)
